titleStmt.title: SII 38.108: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 108. (A.R. No. 108 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south wall, the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Tribhuvaṉachchakkaravattigaḷ Śrī Vīrarājēndrachōḷa Year 9, Karkaṭaka, śu. di. 13, Friday, Rēvati = 1253 A.D. (other details are irregular).

summary.p: This incomplete inscription records a gift of 300 cows called asaṅgādakaṇḍaṉsurabi by Kulōttuṅgasōḻap Paiyyūr-nāḍāḻvāṉ Vaḷaiyamaḻagiyāṉ Oṟṟiarasaṉ for providing milk, curd, ghee and pañchagavyam to the god at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr in Puḻar-koṭṭam alias Vikkramasōḻa-vaḷanāḍu in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa-maṇḍalam. The donor is stated to have entrusted the gift to the temple officials (taṉattār).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrī virarājendracoḻateva
ṟku yāṇṭu 9 vatu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟup pūrvapakṣattu trayodaśi
yum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Irepati nāḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa
coḻamaṇṭalattup puḻaṟkoṭṭamāṉa vikkiramacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu
Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiya nāyaṉāṟkuk kulottuṅkacoḻa
p paiyyūr nāṭāḻvāṉ vaḷaiyamaḻakiyāṉ Oṟṟi Aracaneṉ Innāya
ṉārkkuc cantirātittavarai celvatākaviṭṭa Acaṅkātakaṇṭaṉ curaphiRead curabhi
pacu 3 100 Ippacu muṉṉūṟum celpā(l)lamutu tayiramutu neyiyamutukkum
pañcagaivyam Āṭiyaruḷavum Ikkoyilt tānattār vacam viṭṭeṉ va
Digital edition of SII 38.108 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
